overview: This four-color Pauper control deck stabilizes games by denying opponent spells and resetting aggressive boards. It leverages Counterspell for instant-speed denial, Lorien Revealed for board wipes and mana acceleration, and Skred as a resilient value engine. The goal is to outlast opponents through card advantage and late-game resilience.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents with cumulative card advantage from Skred
Denying key threats and combo pieces with Counterspell to stall for time
Resetting aggressive boards with Lorien Revealed to stabilize and close out games

keep_criteria: Hands containing Counterspell or early interaction
Mana bases that reliably support four colors by turn three
Access to Skred or Lorien Revealed alongside lands
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking instant-speed denial or board control
Mana-heavy hands with no early spells or draw
Hands missing key signature cards or finishers

early_game: Play lands efficiently while holding up mana for Counterspell
Prioritize denying early threats to slow aggressive decks
Draw into Skred or removal to establish a foothold
mid_game: Cast Lorien Revealed to clear boards and fetch additional lands
Deploy Skred to generate value and apply steady pressure
Maintain hand size with counterspells and card draw to stay ahead
late_game: Stabilize against combo or midrange decks with repeated spell denial
Leverage Skred's cumulative value to outresource opponents
Close out games with board control and resilient threats

key_cards.name: Lorien Revealed
key_cards.notes: Cast when facing multiple threats to reset the board; use the landfall effect to fetch additional lands for consistency and four-color support.

key_cards.name: Counterspell
key_cards.notes: Hold up mana to counter key threats, combo pieces, or finishers; prioritize high-impact spells over minor threats to conserve resources.

key_cards.name: Skred
key_cards.notes: Deploy to generate card advantage and apply pressure; protect with counterspells and use its abilities to outlast opponents in long games.

sequencing_tips: Hold up mana for Counterspell before committing to non-essential spells
Cast Lorien Revealed after opponent commits resources to maximize board reset value
Prioritize Skred's value-generating abilities over direct damage when behind on resources

matchups.advice: Use Counterspell on early threats and Lorien Revealed to clear boards; prioritize Skred for sustained pressure.
Save Counterspell for key combo pieces; use Lorien Revealed to disrupt board states; rely on Skred to outvalue if combo fails.
Race with Skred's value generation; use Counterspell efficiently to deny their win conditions; time Lorien Revealed to clear their threats.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Archetype: 4c Control, Format: pauper, Signature cards: Lorien Revealed, Counterspell, Skred
